name: PlayCatalog
description: A gaming platform to manage your game library, track progress, and discover new favorites. Combines personal collection management with social features and recommendations.

name: Lumea
description: A medical appointment management system built on a microservices architecture. Seven specialized services handle appointments, patient records, communications, video calls, and more — each with its own isolated PostgreSQL database.

name: riagoncalves.dev v2.0
description: The second version of my personal website. It's a portfolio website that showcases my projects, skills, and experience.

name: Web RDF Editor
description: A high-performance web editor for viewing and managing RDF graphs and proprietary binary data tables. Features real-time cell editing, schema-driven binary parsing, and virtualized rendering for thousands of rows.

name: Shinobu - Discord Bot
description: Shinobu is a Discord bot that provides a variety of features to enhance your Discord server. It includes features like moderation, music, fun, and more.

name: riagoncalves.dev v1.0
description: The first version of my personal website. It was a simple website that I created to showcase my projects and skills.

name: Sarcastify - Text to Sarcastic Text Converter
description: Sarcastify is a simple web app that converts text to sarcastic text. It's a fun project that I created to practice my web development skills.
